name: Reset Password in RDP (Windows)
description: Sends Ctrl + Alt + Delete to the remote session. Use to change a password or access security options inside a Remote Desktop session.

name: Reset Password in RDP (macOS)
description: Sends Ctrl + Alt + Delete to the remote session from a Mac. Some keyboards may require fn + Control + Option + Backspace.

name: Reload Graphics Driver
description: Restarts the graphics driver without rebooting. Useful for fixing a frozen or glitchy display.

name: Reset NVRAM / PRAM (Intel Mac)
value: Option + Command + P + R  (hold on startup for ~20s)
description: Resets NVRAM/PRAM on Intel Macs. Hold the keys immediately after pressing the power button until you hear the startup sound twice.

name: Safe Boot (Windows)
description: Boots into Windows Safe Mode. Hold Shift and click Restart from the power menu in the Start menu or lock screen.

name: Safe Boot (macOS)
description: Boots into macOS Safe Mode. Hold Shift immediately after pressing the power button (Intel Mac) or after selecting the startup disk (Apple Silicon).

name: Battery Report
description: Generates an HTML battery health report saved to the current directory. Shows charge capacity, cycle count, and usage history.

name: System Boot Time
description: Displays the last system boot time from systeminfo output.

name: Windows Version (Detailed)
value: Get-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion" | Select-Object DisplayVersion, ReleaseId, CurrentBuild, CurrentBuildNumber
description: Retrieves detailed Windows version info including feature update version (e.g. 23H2), build number, and release ID from the registry.

name: List User Accounts
description: Lists all real local user accounts on the Mac. Filters out system and service accounts which all start with an underscore.

name: List Admin Users
description: Shows all members of the local admin group on macOS.

name: Add User to Admin Group
description: Promotes an existing local user to administrator. Replace <username> with the account's short name.

name: Hide User from Login Screen
description: Hides a user account from the macOS login window while keeping the account active. Replace <username> with the account's short name.

name: Connect to Exchange Online
description: Connects to Exchange Online PowerShell using the specified UPN. Run this before any other Exchange Online commands in the session.

name: List User's Calendars
value: Get-MailboxFolderStatistics -Identity user@domain.com -FolderScope Calendar | Select-Object Name, FolderType, ItemsInFolder
description: Lists all calendar folders in a mailbox, including shared and additional calendars with their item counts.

name: Get Calendar Permissions
description: Shows who has access to a user's calendar and what permission level they have (e.g. Reviewer, Editor, Owner).

name: Find Email Address Across Recipients
description: Searches all recipient types (mailboxes, groups, contacts, etc.) for a specific email address. Useful for finding where an address is assigned across the tenant.

name: Get Distribution Group Members
description: Lists all members of a distribution group, showing their display name and primary email address.

name: System Uptime
description: Calculates how long the system has been running since the last boot. Returns days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

name: Hardware Info
description: Returns the device manufacturer, model name, and total RAM in GB.

name: Windows Version (Simple)
description: Returns the Windows edition and version name, e.g. Microsoft Windows 11 Pro.

name: Device Serial Number
description: Retrieves the device serial number from the BIOS. Useful for warranty lookups and asset tracking.

name: Disk Space
description: Lists all drives with their total size and free space in GB.

name: Find Largest Files
value: gci C:\ -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Desc | Select-Object -First 20 FullName, @{N='Size (MB)';E={[math]::Round($_.Length/1MB,2)}}
description: Finds the 20 largest files on the C: drive sorted by size. May take a while on large drives.

name: List Local Users
description: Lists all local user accounts with their enabled status and last logon time.

name: List Local Admins
description: Lists all members of the local Administrators group, including domain accounts and local users.

name: AD User Info
description: Returns Active Directory info for a user including group memberships, password expiry, and logon hours. Replace <username> with the AD username.

name: Full Network Config
description: Displays full network adapter configuration including IP, subnet, gateway, DNS servers, and MAC address for all adapters.

name: Test Port Connectivity
description: Tests TCP connectivity to a host on a specific port. Replace the host and port as needed. Returns TcpTestSucceeded true or false.

name: Active Network Connections
description: Lists all active TCP and UDP connections with local and remote addresses, connection state, and owning process ID (PID).

name: List Installed Software
value: Get-Package | Select Name, Version | Sort-Object Name
description: Lists all software packages registered with PackageManagement, sorted alphabetically by name.

name: List Installed Software (winget)
description: Lists all installed applications via Windows Package Manager, including Store apps, winget packages, and traditional installers.

name: List Licensed M365 Users
description: Returns all licensed users in the tenant with their display name and UPN.

name: Mailbox Size
value: Get-MailboxStatistics -Identity user@domain.com | Select DisplayName, TotalItemSize, ItemCount
description: Returns the total size and item count of a mailbox. Replace user@domain.com with the target address.

name: Flush DNS Cache
description: Clears the local DNS resolver cache. Use when a DNS change has been made and you need the device to pick it up immediately.

name: Clear Temp Files
description: Deletes all files in the current user's temp folder. Files in use will be skipped. Run as the affected user for best results.

name: Check Disk for Errors
description: Schedules a disk check on the C: drive to find and fix errors and locate bad sectors. Requires a reboot to run. /f fixes errors, /r locates bad sectors.

name: Force Group Policy Update
description: Forces an immediate refresh of all Group Policy settings for the computer and current user, regardless of whether settings have changed.

name: Top Processes by Memory
value: Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet -Desc | Select-Object -First 20 Name, Id, @{N='Memory (MB)';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet/1MB,2)}}
description: Lists the top 20 running processes sorted by memory usage in MB. Useful for identifying resource-heavy applications.

name: Check Windows Firewall Status
description: Shows whether the Windows Firewall is enabled or disabled for each profile — Domain, Private, and Public.

name: Event Log Errors (Last 24hrs)
value: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Level=2; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddHours(-24)} | Select TimeCreated, Id, Message | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap
description: Returns System event log errors from the last 24 hours. Level 2 = Error. Change LogName to Application to check the application log.

name: Uninstall App (winget)
description: Silently uninstalls an application by name using Windows Package Manager. Replace App Name with the exact name from winget list.

name: Check Pending Reboot
description: Returns True if a Windows Update reboot is pending, False if not. A quick way to confirm whether a device needs a restart.

name: List Startup Programs
value: Get-CimInstance Win32_StartupCommand | Select Name, Command, Location, User
description: Lists all programs configured to run at startup, including their location (registry or startup folder) and which user they apply to.

name: Get Saved Wi-Fi Password
value: netsh wlan show profile name="SSID" key=clear
description: Displays the saved password for a Wi-Fi network. Replace SSID with the network name. Look for the Key Content field under Security settings.

name: Export Installed Software to CSV
value: Get-Package | Select Name, Version | Sort-Object Name | Export-Csv -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\software.csv" -NoTypeInformation
description: Exports a sorted list of all installed software to a CSV file on the desktop. Useful for audits and asset reporting.

name: Flush DNS Cache
description: Clears the macOS DNS resolver cache and restarts mDNSResponder. Use after a DNS change to force the Mac to pick up new records immediately.

name: Top Processes by CPU
description: Lists the top 20 running processes sorted by CPU usage. Column 3 is %CPU. Useful for identifying runaway processes.

name: Check Disk Health
description: Verifies the integrity of the startup disk partition structure. Does not repair — use diskutil repairDisk if issues are found.

name: Get Saved Wi-Fi Password
description: Retrieves the saved password for a Wi-Fi network from the keychain. Replace SSID with the network name. Will prompt for admin credentials.

name: List Open Ports
description: Shows all ports currently listening for connections, along with the process name and PID. Useful for identifying what's bound to a port.

name: Show Connected USB Devices
description: Lists all USB devices currently connected to the Mac, including hubs, peripherals, and storage devices with manufacturer and product info.

name: System Uptime
description: Shows how long the system has been running, the number of logged-in users, and the 1, 5, and 15 minute load averages.

name: Rebuild Spotlight Index
description: Erases and rebuilds the Spotlight search index on the startup volume. Use when Spotlight results are missing or incorrect. Indexing runs in the background.

name: Reset Network Interface
value: sudo ifconfig en0 down && sudo ifconfig en0 up
description: Brings the primary network interface down and back up. Replace en0 with the correct interface name if needed (use ifconfig to list interfaces).

name: List Login Items
value: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to get the name of every login item'
description: Returns the names of all applications configured to launch at login for the current user.

name: Show Network Interfaces
description: Lists all network interfaces with their IP addresses, MAC addresses, and status. Use to identify interface names like en0, en1, utun0.

name: Battery Cycle Count
description: Returns the battery cycle count from system profiler. Compare against Apple's maximum cycle count for the model to assess battery health.

name: Restart a Service
description: Restarts a Windows service by name. Replace ServiceName with the service's short name (not display name). Use Get-Service to find the correct name.

name: Restart Print Spooler
description: Restarts the Print Spooler service. First step when a printer is stuck or not responding. Clears the service state without deleting queued jobs.

name: Check DNS Servers
description: Shows the DNS servers configured on each network adapter. Useful for confirming whether a machine is pointing at the correct DNS.

name: Get Logged On User (Remote)
description: Returns the currently logged on user of a remote machine. Replace <hostname> with the target computer name or IP. Requires WinRM or admin access.

name: Map a Network Drive
description: Maps a persistent network drive to Z:. Replace Z with the desired drive letter and \\server\share with the UNC path. Add -Credential to prompt for credentials.

name: Clear Print Queue
value: Stop-Service -Name Spooler -Force; Remove-Item -Path "$env:SystemRoot\System32\spool\PRINTERS\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name Spooler
description: Stops the Print Spooler, deletes all queued print jobs, then restarts the service. Use when jobs are stuck and restarting the spooler alone doesn't help.

name: Enable RDP
description: Enables Remote Desktop and opens the firewall rule. Set fDenyTSConnections to 1 to disable RDP. Run as administrator.

name: Check Domain Join Status
description: Returns True if the machine is joined to a domain, False if it is not. Quick check before troubleshooting domain-related issues.

name: Last Windows Update Date
value: Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Desc | Select-Object -First 5 Description, HotFixID, InstalledOn
description: Shows the 5 most recently installed Windows updates with their KB number and install date.

name: Test DNS Resolution
description: Resolves a DNS name and returns the result including IP addresses, TTL, and record type. More detailed than nslookup for PowerShell workflows.

name: Check MDM Enrollment Status
description: Shows whether the Mac is enrolled in an MDM and whether the enrollment profile is active. Useful for confirming Intune or Kandji enrollment.

name: Show Current DNS Servers
description: Lists all DNS nameservers currently configured on the Mac across all network interfaces and resolvers.

name: Ping with Timestamp
value: ping google.com | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "$(date '+%T') $line"; done
description: Runs a continuous ping with a timestamp on each line. Useful for intermittent connectivity issues where you need to know exactly when drops occur.

name: Check for Software Updates
description: Lists all available macOS software updates without installing them. Use softwareupdate -ia to install all.

name: Get Current Wi-Fi SSID
description: Returns the SSID of the Wi-Fi network the Mac is currently connected to. Replace en0 with the correct interface if needed.

name: Show ARP Table
description: Displays the ARP table showing IP-to-MAC address mappings for devices on the local network. Useful for finding a device's IP by its MAC address.

name: Get macOS Version
description: Returns the macOS product name, version number, and build version. Quicker than opening About This Mac.

name: Check SIP Status
description: Shows whether System Integrity Protection (SIP) is enabled or disabled. SIP prevents modification of protected system files even with root access.

name: Toggle Wi-Fi
description: Turns Wi-Fi off on en0. Change off to on to re-enable. Replace en0 with the correct interface name if needed.

name: List All User Groups
description: Lists all local groups on the Mac including system groups and any custom groups that have been created.

name: Add Email Alias
description: Adds an additional email address to a mailbox without removing existing addresses. Replace both addresses as needed.

name: Remove Email Alias
description: Removes a specific email alias from a mailbox without affecting other addresses. Replace both addresses as needed.

name: Convert Mailbox to Shared
description: Converts a regular user mailbox to a shared mailbox. The licence can then be removed. Replace user@domain.com with the target mailbox.

name: Block User Sign-In
description: Blocks a user from signing in to Microsoft 365. Use during offboarding or incident response. Set to $false to re-enable access.

name: Reset MFA for a User
description: Clears the registered MFA methods for a user, forcing them to re-enrol on next sign-in. Use when a user loses access to their authenticator app.

name: Get MFA Status (All Users)
description: Returns MFA status for every user in the tenant. State will be Enabled, Enforced, or Disabled.

name: Add Member to M365 Group
description: Adds a user to a Microsoft 365 group. Replace group@domain.com with the group address and user@domain.com with the user to add.

name: Set Out of Office Message
value: Set-MailboxAutoReplyConfiguration -Identity user@domain.com -AutoReplyState Enabled -InternalMessage "Internal message here" -ExternalMessage "External message here"
description: Enables and sets the out of office auto-reply for a mailbox. Set AutoReplyState to Disabled to turn it off. Replace messages as needed.

name: List All Shared Mailboxes
value: Get-Mailbox -RecipientTypeDetails SharedMailbox | Select DisplayName, PrimarySmtpAddress | Sort DisplayName
description: Returns all shared mailboxes in the tenant with their display name and primary email address, sorted alphabetically.

name: Get Mailbox Forwarding
value: Get-Mailbox -Identity user@domain.com | Select ForwardingAddress, ForwardingSmtpAddress, DeliverToMailboxAndForward
description: Shows whether a mailbox has forwarding configured, where it forwards to, and whether a copy is kept in the original mailbox.

name: Release and Renew IP
description: Releases the current DHCP lease and requests a new IP address. Run when a machine has an incorrect IP or cannot reach the network after a change.

name: System File Checker
description: Scans all protected Windows system files and repairs corrupted ones. Must be run as administrator. Takes several minutes to complete.

name: DISM Health Restore
description: Checks and repairs the Windows component store. Run this before sfc /scannow if system files are repeatedly flagged as corrupt. Requires internet access.

name: List Mapped Drives
value: Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object {$_.DisplayRoot -like "\\*"} | Select Name, DisplayRoot
description: Lists all currently mapped network drives for the session, showing the drive letter and UNC path.

name: BitLocker Status
description: Shows the BitLocker encryption status for all drives. ProtectionStatus will be On, Off, or Unknown. Useful for compliance checks.

name: Windows Defender Status
value: Get-MpComputerStatus | Select AMRunningMode, AntivirusEnabled, AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated, LastFullScanTime
description: Returns Windows Defender status including whether it is active, the last signature update, and the last full scan time.

name: List Network Shares
description: Lists all SMB shares on the local machine including hidden admin shares. Useful for auditing what is being shared on a server or workstation.

name: Force Windows Update Scan
description: Triggers an immediate Windows Update scan in the background. Run when a machine is not picking up updates automatically. Check Settings > Windows Update for results.

name: Check NTP / Time Sync
description: Shows the current NTP time sync status including the source server, last sync time, and offset. Useful when Kerberos or domain auth is failing due to clock skew.

name: Check FileVault Status
description: Returns whether FileVault full-disk encryption is enabled or disabled on the Mac. Use fdesetup enable or disable to change the state.

name: Get Mac Serial Number
description: Returns the Mac's serial number from system profiler. Useful for warranty lookups and asset management without physically inspecting the device.

name: Force MDM Check-In
description: Forces the Mac to check in with its MDM server and apply any pending profiles or policies. Use when a device is not receiving configuration changes.

name: Check Gatekeeper Status
description: Shows whether Gatekeeper is enabled or disabled. Gatekeeper controls which apps can run based on their source. Should be assessments enable on managed devices.

name: List Installed MDM Profiles
description: Lists all configuration profiles installed on the Mac, including MDM enrollment profiles and pushed configuration payloads.

name: Show Routing Table
description: Displays the kernel routing table showing how network traffic is directed. Useful for diagnosing split-tunnel VPN issues or incorrect default gateway.

name: Get Computer Name
description: Returns the Mac's computer name as set in System Settings. Use scutil --get LocalHostName for the Bonjour name or scutil --get HostName for the full hostname.

name: List Mailbox Inbox Rules
value: Get-InboxRule -Mailbox user@domain.com | Select Name, Enabled, Priority, Description
description: Lists all inbox rules configured on a mailbox. Use during security investigations to check for suspicious forwarding or auto-delete rules.

name: Add Full Access to Shared Mailbox
description: Grants a user full access to a shared mailbox. The mailbox will auto-map in Outlook. Replace both addresses as needed.

name: Assign M365 Licence
description: Assigns a licence to a user. Replace tenantname with your tenant prefix and ENTERPRISEPACK with the SKU name. Use Get-MsolAccountSku to list available SKUs and their names.

name: Remove M365 Licence
description: Removes a licence from a user. Replace tenantname with your tenant prefix and ENTERPRISEPACK with the SKU name. Use Get-MsolAccountSku to list SKU names.

name: Get User's Last Sign-In
description: Returns the last interactive and non-interactive sign-in times for a user. Requires the AuditLog.Read.All scope.

name: List All M365 Groups
value: Get-UnifiedGroup | Select DisplayName, PrimarySmtpAddress, GroupMemberCount | Sort-Object DisplayName
description: Returns all Microsoft 365 groups in the tenant with their email address and member count, sorted alphabetically.

name: Hide Mailbox from GAL
description: Hides a mailbox from the Global Address List. Set to $false to make it visible again. Commonly used for service accounts or shared mailboxes that should not appear in the directory.

name: Kill Process by Name
description: Forcefully terminates all running instances of a process by name. Replace processname with the process name without the .exe extension.

name: View DNS Cache
value: Get-DnsClientCache | Select Entry, RecordName, RecordType, Data
description: Displays all entries currently in the local DNS resolver cache. Useful for confirming what DNS records a machine has cached before flushing.

name: Traceroute
description: Traces the network path to a destination, showing each hop and its latency. Replace google.com with the target host. Useful for diagnosing where connectivity drops.

name: Check if Port is in Use
value: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 80 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess
description: Shows what process is using a specific local port. Replace 80 with the port number. Use Get-Process -Id <OwningProcess> to identify the process name.

name: Disable Local User Account
description: Disables a local user account without deleting it. Replace username with the account name. Use Enable-LocalUser to re-enable.

name: List Scheduled Tasks
value: Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object {$_.TaskPath -notlike "\Microsoft\*"} | Select TaskName, TaskPath, State | Sort-Object TaskName
description: Lists all non-Microsoft scheduled tasks on the machine. Filters out built-in Windows tasks to surface third-party and custom entries.

name: Check Proxy Settings
value: Get-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings" | Select ProxyEnable, ProxyServer, ProxyOverride
description: Returns the current user's proxy configuration from the registry. ProxyEnable 1 means proxy is active. Useful when diagnosing connectivity issues on corporate networks.

name: Flush ARP Cache
description: Clears all entries from the local ARP cache. Use when a device has changed IP or MAC address and the machine is still resolving the old one.

name: Kill Process by Name
description: Forcefully terminates a process by its display name. Replace App Name with the exact process name as it appears in Activity Monitor. Use kill -9 $(pgrep name) for CLI process names.

name: Traceroute
description: Traces the network path to a destination showing each hop and its latency. Replace google.com with the target host. Useful for finding where connectivity drops along the route.

name: Disk Usage by Folder
description: Shows the 20 largest top-level directories sorted by size. Useful for finding what is consuming disk space. Run with sudo for accurate results on system folders.

name: Change Hostname
value: sudo scutil --set ComputerName "NewName" && sudo scutil --set LocalHostName "NewName" && sudo scutil --set HostName "NewName"
description: Sets all three hostname values — the display name, Bonjour name, and DNS hostname. Replace NewName with the desired name. Avoid spaces in LocalHostName and HostName.

name: List launchd Services
description: Lists all loaded launchd jobs excluding anonymous entries. Shows the PID, last exit status, and label. Useful for auditing startup daemons and agents.

name: Check if Port is in Use
description: Shows the process using a specific port. Replace 8080 with the port number. Returns the process name, PID, and connection state.

name: Get All Admin Role Assignments
value: Get-MsolRole | ForEach-Object { $r = $_; Get-MsolRoleMember -RoleObjectId $r.ObjectId | Select @{N='Role';E={$r.Name}}, DisplayName, EmailAddress } | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName}
description: Returns every admin role assignment in the tenant, showing which user holds each role. Useful for access audits and offboarding checks.

name: Get Send-As Permissions
description: Shows who has Send-As permission on a mailbox, allowing them to send email as that address. Replace user@domain.com with the target mailbox.

name: Add Send-As Permission
description: Grants a user Send-As permission on a mailbox, allowing them to send email that appears to come from that address. Replace both addresses as needed.

name: Get All Guest Users
value: Get-MsolUser -All | Where-Object {$_.UserType -eq "Guest"} | Select DisplayName, UserPrincipalName, IsLicensed | Sort DisplayName
description: Returns all guest accounts in the tenant. Useful for access audits to identify external users who still have access.

name: Get All Aliases for a User
description: Lists all email addresses assigned to a mailbox. The primary address is prefixed with SMTP (uppercase), aliases with smtp (lowercase).

name: Get Mail Flow / Transport Rules
value: Get-TransportRule | Select Name, State, Priority, Description | Sort-Object Priority
description: Lists all mail flow rules in the tenant sorted by priority. Use during security reviews or when troubleshooting unexpected email routing behaviour.

name: Set Mailbox Language and Timezone
value: Set-MailboxRegionalConfiguration -Identity user@domain.com -Language en-AU -TimeZone "AUS Eastern Standard Time" -DateFormat "d/MM/yyyy"
description: Sets the language, timezone, and date format for a mailbox. Useful after migrating a mailbox or onboarding a user whose Outlook shows the wrong timezone or date format.
